title: phymatosorus powellii
intro: Phymatosorus powellii, also known as the Australian fishbone fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Phymatosorus powellii are thought to include the treatment of arthritis, digestive issues, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Phymatosorus powellii is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
